hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and normalizes blockchain analytics with KYC, KYB, KYT, and Travel Rule outputs to streamline compliance workflows and preserve audit-ready evidence.

problem_title: Compliance slows when provider outputs diverge
problem_description: Digital asset compliance teams face fragmented blockchain analytics and KYT data that remain disconnected across multiple providers. This creates slow, manual workflows with weak risk visibility and fragmented case context that complicate operational decisions and audit readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates blockchain analytics and KYT data from multiple providers into one unified compliance workflow, linking risk signals, case context and evidence for clearer operational control and faster review.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY integrates analytics and provider results through rules, case creation, review, evidence preservation and reporting to support a unified compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond provider outputs. Structured compliance decisions
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects and normalizes outputs from multiple providers into structured workflows, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for clearer compliance control and review.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow

authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a compliance control layer for VASPs, connecting KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and blockchain analytics outputs into one operational workflow for structured reviews and decisions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect blockchain analytics workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes outputs from multiple blockchain providers, applies compliance rules, routes reviews and creates linked cases, enabling efficient risk aggregation and multi-provider analytics within a connected workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence in audit-ready packages to support defensible compliance reviews and reporting workflows obligations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works provider-neutrally by integrating with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and blockchain analytics systems without requiring replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace underlying blockchain analytics providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace blockchain analytics providers but structures their outputs into connected workflows, evidence and reports above the existing systems.
final_title: Connect blockchain analytics into compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY normalizes provider outputs to support case management, decision records and audit-ready evidence for VASP operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
